ideal_output.commonTheme: The idea was clear enough to follow.
ideal_output.usefulSuggestion: Slow the first line so listeners can catch up.
ideal_output.nextPracticeStep: Record the same idea again with one pause.

ideal_output.usefulSuggestion: Add one short reason when it helps the decision.
ideal_output.nextPracticeStep: Use the same sentence with one because phrase.

feedbackList.body: One bullet would make the next step clearer.

ideal_output.commonTheme: The proof showed a real start.
ideal_output.usefulSuggestion: Add one bullet under the heading.
ideal_output.nextPracticeStep: Do one more five minute pass.

proof.title: Better question
proof.body: I asked what would unblock the next step.

feedbackList.body: Say who the question is for.

ideal_output.nextPracticeStep: Ask the question with one sentence of context.

proof.title: Feedback rewrite
proof.body: One observation and one next step.

feedbackList.body: Use an example from the proof.

ideal_output.commonTheme: The feedback is more usable when it is specific.
ideal_output.usefulSuggestion: Anchor it in one example from the proof.
ideal_output.nextPracticeStep: Rewrite one note with an example included.

proof.title: Boundary draft
proof.body: I cannot today, but I can Friday.

ideal_output.commonTheme: The boundary was understandable and respectful.
ideal_output.usefulSuggestion: Remove apology text that weakens the request.
ideal_output.nextPracticeStep: Read the boundary once without adding extra explanation.

ideal_output.commonTheme: The map made the decision easier to compare.
ideal_output.usefulSuggestion: Choose which tradeoff is acceptable for now.
ideal_output.nextPracticeStep: Circle one option and write the reason.

ideal_output.commonTheme: The restart stayed small enough to repeat.
ideal_output.usefulSuggestion: Keep the next practice the same size.

ideal_output.commonTheme: The feedback stayed kind and inside the request.
ideal_output.usefulSuggestion: Add one specific example from the proof.
ideal_output.nextPracticeStep: Use observation plus example plus next step.

proof.title: Main point first
proof.body: I moved the main point up.

ideal_output.commonTheme: The message became easier to scan.
ideal_output.usefulSuggestion: Keep the example short so the first point stays clear.
ideal_output.nextPracticeStep: Edit one more message with the main point first.
